name: Adding a Sales Channel
body:
[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Adding a sales channel allows your business to reach customers across multiple platforms—whether it’s your online store, a physical POS, or a marketplace like Amazon. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Each channel you create helps you track orders more accurately, manage performance per platform, and understand where your sales are coming from. This gives users a clearer picture of business growth, improves reporting, and ensures that the right products, pricing, and inventory are aligned with how and where customers shop."}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Before you begin"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"It’s good to keep these handy:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Have "},{"text":"administrator","bold":true},{"text":" or "},{"text":"settings management","bold":true},{"text":" access."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Know the "},{"text":"configuration preferences ","bold":true},{"text":"of website you want to add. "}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Have the "},{"text":"basic details","bold":true},{"text":" ready:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Channel name (e.g. "},{"text":"Online Store – India","italic":true},{"text":")"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Default currency"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Default tax rules (if required)"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Any integration details (for marketplaces or external channels)"}]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"To Access "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Go to Sales Channel>> Add a Sale channel
"}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Steps to add Sales Channel"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"On the "},{"text":"Sales Channels","bold":true},{"text":" page, click "},{"text":"Add Sales Channel","bold":true},{"text":" "},{"text":"Save.","bold":true}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/12PZJLF6B4UL/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/12PZJLF6B4UL/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":1178596,"width":1920,"height":1079,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F12PZJLF6B4UL%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":1768,"dateInserted":"2025-12-12T10:55:13+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Once you click on Save, you will see a success notification at the top of the page and your store setup will begin automatically. "}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/S4CCENJJ8HUQ/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/S4CCENJJ8HUQ/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":251380,"width":1920,"height":1076,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FS4CCENJJ8HUQ%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":1769,"dateInserted":"2025-12-12T10:55:28+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You will see a message at the top:"},{"text":"“We are setting up your sales channel. No action is required. You can navigate away, we will keep working in the background.”","bold":true},{"text":"

The setup screen displays each step as it completes, including:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"MCC account connection","bold":true},{"text":" – Your account is connected."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"MerchCloud integration","bold":true},{"text":" – Cloud services are configured."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Storefront build","bold":true},{"text":" – Your storefront is created."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Checkout tenant","bold":true},{"text":" – Secure checkout becomes active."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Cloud resource provisioning","bold":true},{"text":" – Background cloud resources are set up.
"}]}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Once the system has finished provisioning your sales channel, you will see a "},{"text":"Setup Complete","bold":true},{"text":" screen confirming that your store is ready to use. 
"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You will see a button to immediately explore your new storefront: "},{"text":"Explore Store. ","bold":true},{"text":"This screen acts as the final checkpoint before you begin configuring your store’s content and design.

You will also see two guided next steps:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Add Your Products","bold":true},{"text":"
Upload your product catalog to start assigning prices, inventory, and variants."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Customize Your Theme","bold":true},{"text":"
Personalize the look and feel of your storefront, including layout, colors, and branding.
"}]}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You can click on “Explore Store” option to go to General Store page, here you will add and edit the store information.  For a detailed guide on editing and adding information to the General Store Page, click here.
"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Your Store setup is now complete and visible on the Sales Channels page.
